title: Paragraph-level amendment (one row per amended paragraph)
description: One paragraph-level amendment. For acts that touch multiple paragraphs of multiple laws, there are N rows. Sourced from joining the amendments and amendment_acts tables in the snapshot SQLite database.

act_refid.description: Amending act refid; foreign key to amendment-acts.refid. Pattern allows pre-1970s acts that lack a numeric counter.

act_title.description: Short title of the amending act.

target_law.description: Refid of the law/forskrift being amended. Pattern allows pre-1970s acts that lack a numeric counter.

paragraph.description: Normalized paragraph reference, e.g. '§ 7-25' or '§ 1-2a'. Null when the amendment is at chapter level or a letter that couldn't be canonicalized.

change_type.description: Whether the amendment changed, added, removed, repealed, renumbered, or moved the paragraph. 'unknown' when Lovdata wording didn't fit any specific pattern.

instruction.description: Lovdata's instruction text, e.g. '§ 7-25 skal lyde:'. Truncated to 200 chars.

new_text.description: Replacement paragraph wording from Lovdata. Truncated to 4000 chars. Only populated when change_type is 'change' or 'add'.
